description: Synthetic, public-safe summarization examples with explicit constraints.

input.text: FakeCo's robot vacuum launch moved from Tuesday to Thursday after QA found a battery warning bug. The team fixed the issue and updated release notes.

cases.expected: FakeCo delayed the robot vacuum launch by two days after QA found a battery warning bug.

input.text: In the fictional city app, the transit alert service was noisy for 30 minutes. Engineers rolled back the alert rule, restored normal traffic, and planned a test update.

expected.summary: Engineers rolled back a noisy transit alert rule, restored service, and planned stronger tests.
